feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Hands-on Practice for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy is temporarily unavailable
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

Has anyone else been experiencing issues with the "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy" practice system being temporarily unavailable recently? Some of my colleagues and I are currently working towards EC Core certification, but system downtimes are making it difficult to proceed...

Curious to hear whether you have experienced the same lately.

Best, Elina

entry.title: How to get Workflow Status Values in Business Rule?
entry.content:
How to get Workflow Status Values in Business Rules. (So, it will show Workflow Values like Approved, Declined, Withdrawn)

Thanks in Advance....

entry.title: Custom Navigation with User ID as Parameter
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to add a custom button to the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Profile. When clicked, the button should redirect the user to an external website, with the user's User ID passed as a URL parameter.

This functionality is intended to enable seamless integration between SuccessFactors and the external system.

Please let me know how we can proceed with this implementation.

Thank you.

entry.title: Does Skill Inference in SuccessFactors Auto-Generate Attribute Details from External Catalogs?
entry.content:
Hello,

I’ve been reviewing the following official resources related to SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub and its AI-based skill inference capabilities from Continuous Performance Management (CPM) data:

  • Blog post:
    https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/talent-intelligence-hub-2024-updates-and-behind-the-scenes/bc-p/13903648

  • Demo video:
    https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_hcv94fy5

  • Help Portal:
    https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/using-talent-intelligence-hub/recommending-skills-based-on-continuous-performance-management-data?locale=en-US

I have a few questions regarding the actual behavior and implementation details, and I’d greatly appreciate any clarification or insights from the community.

  1. Based on the resources above, I understand that AI can recommend skills based on data from the achievements, activities, or feedback sections of Continuous Performance Management. I’d like to confirm if there are any other reference materials or important considerations that users should be aware of regarding this functionality.

  2. It’s also stated that external skill catalogs such as O*NET and ESCO are used to support skill inference. I understand this to be true at least conceptually, but I’d like to better understand to what extent these catalogs are actually used in current implementations—for example, whether they are directly matched during inference, or used only for classification or reference.

  3. My main question is: When a new skill is inferred by the AI, is only the skill name (i.e., the identifier in the attribute library) added, or does the system also automatically populate other metadata—such as definitions, descriptions, or behavioral indicators—based on external catalogs like ESCO?
    I have not been able to find concrete information on whether full skill profiles are auto-generated or only the label is suggested.

entry.title: Replicates the behavior of the "Position Entry Date" field
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well!

I need to create a rule that replicates the behavior of the "Position Entry Date" field:

Could you please assist me with this?

Thank you in advance!

#EmployeeCentral #Position #PositionEntryDate #Rule

entry.title: HR Administrator working in "legal entity 1" should only add new employee for "legal entity 1"
entry.content:
Hello experts,

The requirement of our client is to assign permissions to each HR administrator to add a new employee for a SPECIFIC legal entity. Any tips please?

entry.title: Error-Distribución de centros de costos
entry.content:
En ambiente preview, estoy tratando de editar o agregar un registro nuevo para el portlet de distribución de centros de costos y me genera el siguiente error:

errorId=bec40559-bb97-42ea-9cdf-13d9050a46b5, fingerprint=27fc5841e8f93d9f953050715ad17397d3d8858e, timestamp=2025-06-24T22:32:09.783+0000, errorMessage=Se produjo un error de aplicación. Vuelva a intentarlo más tarde o notifique a la asistencia técnica (comunique la información de error errorId=bec40559-bb97-42ea-9cdf-13d9050a46b5, timestamp=2025-06-24T22:32:09.783+0000 y la información de versión de la pantalla actual) si el problema sigue sucediendo.

entry.title: one day before the employee's leave start date
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have configured a workflow rule to notify the manager one day before the employee's leave start date, as requested. The rule is working, and the alert is being sent out successfully.

However, I'm facing an issue where the manager is receiving two identical email notifications instead of just one. The reminder should only be triggered once via email.

Could someone please help me identify why this duplication is happening and suggest how to ensure the manager receives only a single reminder

Thanks

entry.title: Successfactors - create job to run Importing Matrix and Custom Managers
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Using the "Importing Matrix and Custom Managers" transaction, we disable the matrix manager relationships from being displayed in the org chart. However, every time a personal data change is sent from SAP to SuccessFactors, this deactivation is overridden, and the transaction must be executed again.
Is it possible to create a job that automatically performs this transaction?
Thank you.

M.

entry.title: Create Event Reasons
entry.content:
Hello,

I would need to create a new event reason for Offboarding within the Employee Central module. I have set up the necessary event reason via the Manage Organization, Pay and Job Structures tool, but it does not appear in the picklist for the event reasons, when selecting "Offboard" in the employees' profile. Could you kindly advise on how to proceed for the newly created event reason become available for selection?

Best regards,
A.

entry.title: Automate Job Info Portlet with Position to Job Info Synchronization in SAP SF Employee Central
entry.content:
Agenda

  1. Why Synchronization Position and Job Info fields? in SAP Successfactors Employee Central.
  2. How Synchronization works in SAP Successfactors Employee Central.
  3. How to configure Position → JobInfo sync using Business Rules in SAP Successfactors Employee Central.
  4. Pro-tips for error reduction and automation.
  5. Final thoughts.

Why Should Position and Job Info Be Synced?

  • In SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, both Position and Job Information Portlets often hold overlapping data → like Department, Location, or Division. When these don’t match, confusion and manual errors occur.
  • By enabling Position-to-Job Info Synchronization , we allow Automatic Population of updated values from the position object into the employee’s job information portlet. It saves time and avoids discrepancies
  • Position and job information portlet Both should Match. Usually positions have tendency to Synchronize data to job information portlet. That means if you get 1 new update in position then those information can be automatically populated from Position job information portlet Info Via position to Job information Synchronization.
  • If you have different information on employee profile i .e job information portlet and on a position, how can you recognize the correct information?
  • So, You need to synced both Position and job information portlet data to avoid mismatch inofrmation to reduced the inconsistencey in the data. If you are not using Synchronization then you're losing automation as the data from the position is not matched with Job Information portlet.
  • In configuration using position management, only use Position-to-Job Info synchronization most commonly used the other Synchronization is a  little bit tricky and is not as much straight forward as this Positio-To-Job Information. I strongly recommend you to use Position to Job Information Synchronization in Manage Position management settings to reduce this data redundancy.

How Synchronization works:

  • Go to "Position Management Settings".
  • Navigate to the "Synchronization Tab".
    • The "Synchronization Tab" determines the behavior of the system when synchronizing data from a Position to an employee’s Job Information. This includes the rules for defining fields used in synchronization of Position to an employee’s Job Information.
  • Configure the fields that should sync
  • Add Business Rules for triggering updates (e.g., when a position is changed, reflect changes in Job Info).

How to configure Position → JobInfo sync using Business Rules in SAP SF EC:

To configure Position → JobInfo synchronization using Business Rules in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, follow this step-by-step guide, specifically using the "Synchronize Position Changes to Incumbents" scenario.

Step-by-Step: Position to JobInfo Sync Configuration with Business Rule:

Define the Use Case:

  • When a change happens in the Position object (like Department, Division, Location), it should automatically reflect in the employee's Job Information portlet.
  • This is handled via a Business Rule using the Scenario: Synchronize Position Changes to Incumbents.

Create the Business Rule:

  1. Go to Configure Business Rules.

  2. Click Create New Rule.

  3. Choose Position Management  - Pre Delivered Template. 

  4. Under Scenario, select: Synchronize Position Changes to Incumbents.

Register the Rule in Position Management Settings:

  1. Go to Admin Center → Position Management Settings.

  2. Navigate to the Synchronization Tab.

  3. Find the field: "Rule for Synchronizing Position to Job Information".

  4. Assign the Business Rule you just created (Sync_Position_To_JobInfo)

  5. Save the configuration.

Ensure Sync Triggers on Job Info Changes:

  • Also make sure:

    • If the position field is edited within Job Info, this rule should still trigger.

    • Use Position Code as a field in Job Information portlet.

    • Validate permissions and ensure the employee is tied to a valid position.

Pro-tips for error reduction and automation:

  • Use only the direction Position → JobInfo Synchronization.
  • Avoid two-way Synchronization i.e. Position → JobInfo Synchronization & JobInfo → Position Synchronization. to reduce data loops and overwrites.
  • "If you're not syncing the data then there is mandatory inconsistency between both Position & Job Information Portlet, you're missing automation."
  • Test in Preview or Staging before deploying to Production.
  • Clearly document synced fields to reduce confusion.

Final Thoughts on Position → Job Information Synchronization:

Synchronizing between Position to Job Information portlet is not just a technical configuration—it's a strategic step toward ensuring data integrity, process automation, and organizational consistency.

By automating this Synchronization:

  • You eliminate manual data entry and human errors.

  • Keep employee records aligned with organizational structures.

  • Enable clean, audit-ready data for downstream processes like reporting, payroll, and workflows.

When configured correctly using business rules and one-way sync, it transforms how your HR operations function—bringing accuracy, efficiency, and confidence to every transaction.

Regards,

Mahnoor Naseem

SAP SuccessFactors Consultant

If you found this blog a useful please consider giving it a Kudos

entry.title: Delete future dated records and dates in job relationship
entry.content:
Hello.

if someone mistakenly uploaded future dated record in job relationship portlet in production and now how to delete future dated records and dates in Job relationship portlet in SuccessFactors? i have tried via delimit however it is just relationship got removed but future dates still shown. i tried via delete how that option doesn't support the system.

Could you please help me to understand how we can delete the future dated records and dates in job relationship portlet via import?

entry.title: Filter on Employee centeral one time payment
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m working on a scenario involving SAP SuccessFactors One-Time Payments, and I’d appreciate your insights on a potential workaround we're evaluating.

Context

  • The customer maintains an Assignment Number in SAP HCM IT0015.

  • This Assignment Number will be replicated from HCM to Employee Central, and populated into the customString1 field of the EmpPayCompNonRecurring entity.

  • The customer uses this Assignment Number to group multiple one-time payments.

  • A custom application reads one-time payment records from SuccessFactors, using this Assignment Number as the key for grouping.

The Problem

  • In the EmpPayCompNonRecurring entity, the field customString1 is not filterable via the OData API.

  • This limitation prevents us from using queries like:

    http
     
    $filter=customString1 eq '10000069'

  • The only available field that is filterable in this entity is sequenceNumber, which is a standard field.

Proposed Workaround

  • Create a business rule on the One-Time Payment “onSave” event.

  • Use this rule to populate the sequenceNumber field with:

    • The Assignment Number (from customString1),

    • Concatenated with a unique identifier to ensure each record remains distinct.

  • This would enable OData queries like:

    http
     
    $filter=startswith(sequenceNumber, '10000069')

    which would effectively retrieve all one-time payments grouped by Assignment Number.

Customer Concern

  • The customer is hesitant to use sequenceNumber in this way, since it is a standard field.

  • They are concerned that modifying it could introduce side effects or conflict with existing or future system behaviour.

Although I haven't found any technical issues with this approach so far, the concern is valid and understandable.

Questions for the Community

  • Has anyone implemented something similar to group or filter one-time payments using Assignment Number?

  • Have you ever overridden sequenceNumber for custom logic?

  • Are there any known side effects or caveats of using(modifying) standard fields like sequenceNumber this way?

  • Should we consider raising a ticket to SAP requesting enhancement of the One-Time Payment OData API to make fields like customString1 and customDouble1 filterable?

Looking forward to your thoughts and recommendations!

Thanks in advance,
Manu

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Integration with BigQuery
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for guidance on how to connect SAP SuccessFactors with Google BigQuery.

The objective is to extract data from SAP SF and push it into BigQuery, and then load the new data back to SAP SF. I’m exploring different integration methods and would appreciate any advice on:

  • The best way to establish the connection
  • Whether to use Integration Center, SAP CPI, or any other method
  • Any documentation, experiences, or lessons learned from those who have done something similar

Would appreciate any help or pointers you can share. Thank you.

entry.title: Backup file in SAP SucessFactors
entry.content:
Hello All-

My customer has a requirement where he wants to view the latest backup file for entire SAP SuccessFactors suite.

I followed KBA- https://me.sap.com/notes/2568976  but didnt get proper answer.

Customer needs to know as when last backup happened along with a screenshot.

entry.title: Sickness Absence notifications when certain triggers have been met
entry.content:
Can the system send a notification email to alert when an employee exceeds a specified number of sick days within a rolling 12-month period?

Or if they have taken 3 short instances within a rolling 12-month?

 

We would want the e-mail to be sent to their people leader with a CC

entry.title: Assistance Needed for Mass Change in Employee Centra
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I hope this message finds you well.

I need your assistance with a mass update in Employee Central related to the general increase in Basic Pay, which is tied to Pay Grades. My client has not implemented a pay scale structure; instead, they manage the pay components through pay grades. This includes both the Pay Grade and Pay Scale Type in employees’ job information.

Could you please specify the appropriate tool for implementing this overall increase in Employee Central?

I appreciate your help!

Best regards,
Carolina

entry.title: 1H 2025 - Mobile App Feature - Custom MDF Object
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 

Does the mobile app feature post 1H 2025 update stopped supporting Custom MDF Object?

Created a custom card and added the custom MDF object in the New People profile which is visible in Web and not in mobile. 

Checked the object permission and API visibility, everything looks fine. 

Looking forward for your input.

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: EC Rehire a Not OK to Rehire
entry.content:
Hello,

Let us assume that I have offboarded an employee with the condition of them being Not Eligible for Rehire. Therefore, it is currently impossible to rehire them through Rehire Inactive Employee and their profile is already missing from the system and can not be found via Search option. Could you advise on a way to locate the respective employee's profile and change the Rehire condition or rehire them despite the set condition?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Make JobInfo Field Mandatory
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

There is a field in the Job Information section that also appears during the Add New Employee process in SF Employee Central. I need to make this field mandatory, as it is crucial for a subsequent integration job to function correctly. The field is of type string and uses a picklist.
I’ve updated the configuration in BCUI to set the field as mandatory, but this has had no effect — the field still lacks a red asterisk, and the system allows submission without it being filled in.
Could you please advise on how to properly enforce this requirement?

Kind regards,
A.
